subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face towards the Kingdom of God! Thy letter was received. Thou hast asked regarding the contribution
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت الله نامه شما رسید در خصوص اعانه باطفال مدرسه تربیت سوال
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @importance of community building, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @East and West; communication between East and West
